findings.title: Sequential git subprocess calls cause 6s timeout
findings.description: git_state.py _get_last_commit makes 3 sequential subprocess calls. Each has 2s timeout. Total: 6s worst case. Under load (p99 2x), becomes 12s. parallel_capture has 2s timeout = guaranteed failure.

evidence.proof: 3 calls x 2s = 6s. p99 (2x) = 12s. parallel_capture timeout 2s = FAIL

impact.business_consequence: Git state fails under load. Users lose repo context.
